name: linkedin-post-writer
description: Convert blog posts to native LinkedIn posts, 2026 algorithm-optimized. 12 hook formulas, 5 post-format decision matrix (carousel/text-only/short-video/multi-image), Niche Rotation scheduler (Tue+Thu, US 9AM ET / ID 9AM WIB), Link-in-Comment pattern (avoids 60% reach penalty), MixPost integration for auto-publishing. Built on Depth Score + Interest Graph research (127 sources).
